description: Distribution pipeline configuration. API credentials stored in GCP Secret Manager — never hardcode here.

instagram.notes: Requires Facebook Page linked to IG Business account. Images must be hosted URL.

twitter.notes: Media upload separate endpoint. Thread posting requires chaining.

facebook.notes: Similar to IG. Richer formatting. Link previews auto-generated.

scheduler.notes: Will upgrade to Cloud Run + Cloud Scheduler if posting frequency exceeds 2/day

three_layer_protection.layer_1: DB status enum constraint — only 'approved' posts enter distribution
three_layer_protection.layer_2: MCP draft_only flag — Meta uses published=false, Twitter logs for manual
three_layer_protection.layer_3: Google Task created for manual review and publish
